case.name: XSpec test with no helper pipelines

collection.case: call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ ../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/run-xproc.xpl ^ -xslt-functions=../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -catalogs=../catalog.xml ^ -input:source=../tutorial/xproc/xproc-testing-demo-library.xspec ^ -output:result="file:///%WORK_DIR:\=/%/xproc-testing-demo-library-result_%RANDOM%.html" ^ -xslt-message-prefix="" call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line -1 x "passed: 2 / pending: 0 / failed: 1 / total: 3"

case.name: XSpec test with a helper pipeline
XSpec test with a helper stylesheet

collection.case: call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ ../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/run-xproc.xpl ^ -xslt-functions=../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -input:source=../tutorial/xproc/xproc-testing-demo.xspec ^ -output:result="file:///%WORK_DIR:\=/%/xproc-testing-demo-result_%RANDOM%.html" ^ -xslt-message-prefix="" ^ -option:xspec-home="file:///%PARENT_DIR_ABS:\=/%/" call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line -1 x "passed: 2 / pending: 0 / failed: 1 / total: 3"

case.name: XProc 3 harness with catalog file URI (XProc)

collection.case: call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ ../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/run-xproc.xpl ^ -xslt-functions="../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl;catalog/01/helper.xpl" ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -catalogs="catalog/01/catalog-public.xml;file:///%CD:\=/%/catalog/01/catalog-rewriteURI.xml;../catalog.xml" ^ -input:source="%CD%\catalog\catalog-01_xproc.xspec" ^ -output:result="file:///%WORK_DIR:\=/%/catalog-file-path-xproc3-xproc-test-result_%RANDOM%.html" ^ -xslt-message-prefix="" call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line -1 x "passed: 6 / pending: 0 / failed: 0 / total: 6"

case.name: Passing test cases for testing XProc steps

collection.case: rem Run series of tests, and return error messages if anything fails call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ xproc/run-xproc-cases.xpl ^ -xslt-functions="../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl;catalog/01/helper.xpl;../tutorial/helper/ws-only-text/test-helper.xpl;xproc/cases/library-mirror.xpl" ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -catalogs="catalog/01/catalog-public.xml;file:///%CD:\=/%/catalog/01/catalog-rewriteURI.xml;../catalog.xml" ^ -xslt-message-prefix="" call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line * r "--- Testing completed with no failures! ---"

case.name: Error cases for testing XProc steps (runner errors only)

collection.case: rem Run series of tests, and indicate if anything does not raise the expected test runner error call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ xproc\run-xproc-error-cases.xpl ^ -xslt-functions="../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl" ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -catalogs="catalog/01/catalog-public.xml;file:///%CD:\=/%/catalog/01/catalog-rewriteURI.xml;../catalog.xml" ^ -xslt-message-prefix="" ^ -option:error-phase=runner call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line * r "--- Each test raised the expected error. ---"

case.name: XProc 3 harness with XProc producing JUnit report

collection.case:
rem HTML report file set "ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR=%CD%\end-to-end\cases\actual__\xproc" call :mkdir-if-not-exist "%ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR%" set "ACTUAL_REPORT=%ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR%\tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-result.html" rem JUnit report file set "ACTUAL_JUNIT_REPORT=%ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR%\tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-junit.xml"
rem Run call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ ../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/run-xproc.xpl ^ -xslt-functions="../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl" ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -input:source=end-to-end\cases\tutorial_xproc-testing-demo.xspec ^ -output:result="file:///%ACTUAL_REPORT:\=/%" ^ -output:junit="file:///%ACTUAL_JUNIT_REPORT:\=/%" ^ -option:xspec-home="file:///%PARENT_DIR_ABS:\=/%/" ^ -option:junit-enabled=true call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line -1 x "Generating JUnit Report..."
rem Verify HTML report including #72 call :run java -cp "%SAXON_CP%" net.sf.saxon.Transform ^ -s:"%ACTUAL_REPORT%" ^ -xsl:end-to-end\processor\html\compare.xsl ^ EXPECTED-DOC-URI="file:///%ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR:\=/%/../../expected/xproc/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-result.html" ^ NORMALIZE-HTML-DATETIME="2000-01-01T00:00:00Z" call :verify_retval 0
rem Verify that inline CSS uses > instead of > call :run %SYSTEMROOT%\system32\find "> h2:first-of-type" "%ACTUAL_REPORT%" call :verify_line_count 3 call :verify_line 3 x "body > h2:first-of-type {"
rem Verify JUnit report call :run java -cp "%SAXON_CP%" net.sf.saxon.Transform ^ -s:"%ACTUAL_JUNIT_REPORT%" ^ -xsl:end-to-end\processor\junit\compare.xsl ^ EXPECTED-DOC-URI="file:///%ACTUAL_REPORT_DIR:\=/%/../../expected/xproc/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-junit.xml" call :verify_retval 0

case.name: XProc 3 harness with XProc, checking no JUnit report

collection.case: rem Save the random value and use it for the files created so they can be checked set RANDOM_TEST_VALUE=%RANDOM% call :run java -cp %MORGANAXPROC_CP% com.xml_project.morganaxproc3.XProcEngine ^ ../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/run-xproc.xpl ^ -xslt-functions="../src/xproc3/xproc-testing/steps-for-test-runner.xpl" ^ -xslt-connector=%MORGANAXPROC_XSLT_CONNECTOR% ^ -input:source=../tutorial/xproc/xproc-testing-demo.xspec ^ -output:result="file:///%WORK_DIR:\=/%/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-result_%RANDOM_TEST_VALUE%.html" ^ -output:junit="file:///%WORK_DIR:\=/%/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-junit_%RANDOM_TEST_VALUE%.xml" ^ -option:xspec-home="file:///%PARENT_DIR_ABS:\=/%/" ^ -option:junit-enabled=false call :verify_retval 0 call :verify_line -2 x "Formatting Report..." call :verify_exist "%WORK_DIR:\=/%/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-result_%RANDOM_TEST_VALUE%.html" call :verify_not_exist "%WORK_DIR:\=/%/tutorial_xproc-testing-demo-junit_%RANDOM_TEST_VALUE%.xml"
